summary: Oak & Pixel builds high-end websites, lead-generation systems, automation strategy, and digital infrastructure for ambitious brands.

services.name: Signature Plan
services.answer: A professional digital foundation with a website, booking system, appointment reminders, basic invoicing, and essential digital presence. Pricing is R10,000 setup plus R4,499/month.

services.name: Growth Plan
services.answer: An operations and lead-management plan with online payments, CRM, KPI dashboards, automated communications, and LeadSense Core. Pricing is R18,000 setup plus R6,999/month.

services.name: Private Plan
services.answer: A fully integrated growth ecosystem with Atlas AI chatbot, WhatsApp automation, client portal, advanced reporting, API integrations, process automation, and monthly optimisation consulting. Pricing is R30,000 setup plus R12,499/month.

services.name: Digital Advisory Session
services.answer: A focused strategy session for prioritising digital systems, technical direction, automation opportunities, and next steps.

questions.question: What does Oak & Pixel do?
questions.answer: Oak & Pixel designs and builds premium websites, lead-generation systems, automation strategy, and digital infrastructure.

questions.question: Where is Oak & Pixel based?
questions.answer: Oak & Pixel is based in Randburg, Gauteng, South Africa.

questions.question: How do I contact Oak & Pixel?
questions.answer: Email info@oakandpixel.co.za, call +27 (75) 089 0614, use WhatsApp at https://wa.me/0750890614, or submit the contact form on the website.
